title: The Island’s Old Wounds Return
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #7, Jarul, Unknown person #8, World Government, Unknown person #9 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald's diplomacy soon started to bear fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Elbaf's winter finally came to a close.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Branch Route One?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! It'll help build inter-village trade and communication!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Restoring the fractured nation and venturing across the seas continued to be prioritised while other things became an afterthought.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Freak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Estrid's older brother was appointed as Loki's personal steward.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the realm of the dead! Isn't it dangerous here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The coastline keeps this area separated, so the beasts won't come near.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're so quite when you're worried!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pinch pinch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you have training with Elbo from West Village?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You should head back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is IDA's tavern, ya hear! Fishermen, casaways, even pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm ready for any and all customers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with any luck, I'll be of help to Harald!')

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: 56 years ago, Jarul's house

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were at the scene of the reverie incident, Harald?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah... my friend was one of the invited kings. He struggled me in as one of his guards.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't ask the questions I wanted to without blowing my cover.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that murder hadn't happened.. I might've been exposed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you were caught, all this would be the least of your worries!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haven't you heard the tale of the gale-ra warhammer company"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're that gruff troupe of giant shipwrights that arm themselves with warhammers, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I thought they were just a myth?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No, they existed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They really did travel far and wide, sending letters back to Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I received the final letter myself; it said they'd all been captured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you believe it? Over a hundred warriors were taken prisoner, including ancient giants.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: You think the world government was responsible?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no doubt that they once faced a great enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, they sank deep into the ocean at a certain point in history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: To be blunt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's probably a deeper reason why your ideals haven't worked out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it has nothing to do with you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ungering animosity, huh???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These are just rumors, but I also heard a story about a frozen army of giants somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems our people are regarded as enemies of the larger world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Clearly, but I've already resolved to face any hurdle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PRINCE LOL!! I know you cursed and killed my little sister!!^

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: PRINCE LOK!!!)

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
